screen_time.name: App Usage
screen_time.description: Tracks which apps you use and for how long. Records are aggregated by clock hour, so the first entries appear on your timeline only after the current hour ends.
Polls the foreground app each second and emits one summary per app per clock hour, flushed shortly after each hour ends.

enabled.label: Enable App Usage Sync
enabled.description: Track frontmost-app activation events and write hourly summaries to memory.

sync_interval_minutes.label: Flush Interval
sync_interval_minutes.description: How often to flush completed hourly app-usage buckets into memory.
